narrative:
Precinct Streetsboro 1-D (precinct in Portage County) has 807 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
